# OWL CM130 energy monitor -- test codes for the Oregon-CM130 decoder
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/1493
#
# Each line is the on-wire OOK-Manchester frame (preamble 00 00 00 + the
# 0x60-sync message, pre-reflect_nibbles) reconstructed from the codes
# posted in the issue, so `rtl_433 -y` reproduces the exact decode.
# Annotations are the reference readings from the issue.

## @mzealey readings, house code 0x85 (rflink cross-reference, separate run;
## rflink WATT column is a different tool's decode and does not always match)
# rflink WATT=02d1
{120}000000601ca1b40048efa00000001a
# rflink WATT=02a0
{120}000000601ca15400708060000000da
# rflink WATT=028b
{120}000000601ca114006dc860000000d7
# rflink WATT=027f
{120}000000601ca1540060e460000000fb
# rflink WATT=027a
{120}000000601ca1e400450c6000000038
# rflink WATT=02ad
{120}000000601ca154001f326000000026
# rflink WATT=027f
{120}000000601ca154000b6a60000000d2
# rflink WATT=0271
{120}000000601ca1e400480660000000a3
# rflink WATT=09d7
{120}000000601ca1540019c56000000093
# rflink WATT=0971
{120}000000601ca1e900389760000000ae
# rflink WATT=09e8
{120}000000601ca10d005b30e0000000fd
# rflink WATT=09ec
{120}000000601ca17900238ce0000000eb
# rflink WATT=09d9
{120}000000601ca1b900396ae00000005c
# rflink WATT=095e
{120}000000601ca1a900575ee000000031
# rflink WATT=02a3
{120}000000601ca154005cb9e0000000a8
